title: mespilodaphne glauca
intro: Mespilodaphne glauca, also known as the yellow daphne, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mespilodaphne glauca include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, Mespilodaphne glauca can be made into a tea by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water, or it can be used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
